input.headline: The words you can't say on the internet There's a secret list of words you can't say on social media – at least, that's what everyone seems to think.

raw.headline: The words you can't say on the internet There's a secret list of words you can't say on social media – at least, that's what everyone seems to think.

winner: Why did the internet censor go broke? Because it kept blocking words from its vocabulary!

candidates.text: I heard there's a secret list of words you can't say on the internet. I guess it includes 'can't' and 'secret'.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the idea of a secret list, concise and specific with clever wordplay."}

candidates.text: Why did the internet censor go broke? Because it kept blocking words from its vocabulary!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. It's a generic pun that doesn't fully engage with the concept of internet censorship or the idea of a secret list of words."}

candidates.text: Why was the internet always in trouble with its language teacher? Because it couldn't stop swearing off certain words!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'swearing off certain words,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity. The setup about the internet and a language teacher is a common trope, reducing surprise and impact."}

candidates.text: Why was the internet always in trouble? Because it kept swearing under its breath!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. It's a mild pun that doesn't fully engage with the concept of 'secret words' or internet censorship."}

candidates.text: Why was the dictionary so upset about social media? It couldn't find its own words on there!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'words' and 'dictionary,' but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity to the headline's focus on social media restrictions."}
